case_title: BALWANT D. THAKOR VS. MICHAEL VERA

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D. AS TO DEFENDANT VERA, MICHAEL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
